title: Fast Fiction Factory Malformed/Missing Source-Span Guard
purpose: Add exactly one negative validator fixture for malformed, missing, or unusable source-span payloads so invalid source evidence cannot silently become accepted Profile, Claim, or Timeline routed candidates.
generated_from: User review: Review Hub too vertically long, English-first, layered between story and project information, and Raw Story Memo sticky behavior feels awkward

$missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; node --check tools/fff-state.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'State tool syntax failed' }; node --check tools/fff-extract-local.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Adapter tool syntax failed' }; node --check tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Source-span pack tool syntax failed' }; node tools/fff-extract-local.mjs artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-smoke-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Adapter smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-extract-local.mjs --matrix artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Adapter matrix failed' }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Source-span review pack failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-routing-policy artifacts/ambiguous-routing-resolution-result.json artifacts/routing-policy-regression-hardening-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Routing policy regression smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-broad-span-split artifacts/source-span-quality-audit-result.json artifacts/broad-span-split-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Broad-span split smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-weak-span-repair artifacts/source-span-quality-audit-result.json artifacts/weak-span-repair-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Weak-span repair smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-missing-fixture-class-probe artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/missing-fixture-class-probe-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Missing fixture class probe smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Extraction fixture smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-malformed-missing-span-guard artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json artifacts/malformed-missing-span-guard-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Malformed/missing source-span guard smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Current state validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Sample state validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Sample extraction validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Extraction fixture validation failed' }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-malformed-missing-span-guard-001' -or $manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Manifest active guard mismatch' }; $guard = Get-Content artifacts/malformed-missing-span-guard-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($guard.artifact_id -ne 'fff-malformed-missing-span-guard-001' -or $guard.schemaVersion -ne 'fff.malformedMissingSpanGuard.v1' -or -not $guard.passed) { throw 'Malformed/missing span guard result mismatch' }; if ($guard.summary.validator_fixture_count -ne 8 -or $guard.summary.expected_invalid_fixture_count -ne 6 -or $guard.summary.accepted_routed_candidates -ne 0 -or $guard.summary.failures -ne 0) { throw 'Malformed/missing span guard count mismatch' }; foreach ($prop in $guard.fixture_guard_checks.PSObject.Properties) { if ($prop.Value.passed -ne $true) { throw ('Malformed/missing span guard check failed: ' + $prop.Name) } }; if (-not $guard.guard_behavior.reject_as_invalid -or -not $guard.guard_behavior.hold_as_unreviewable -or -not $guard.guard_behavior.mark_missing_source_ref -or -not $guard.guard_behavior.keep_out_of_claim_timeline_profile_adoption) { throw 'Guard behavior mismatch' }; $validator = Get-Content artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $validator.passed -or $validator.summary.fixtureCount -ne 8 -or $validator.summary.expectedInvalid -ne 6) { throw 'Validator fixture count mismatch' }; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $pack.passed -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.fixture_count -ne 4 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.total_elements -ne 48) { throw 'Source-span pack guard mismatch' }; $regression = Get-Content artifacts/routing-policy-regression-hardening-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $regression.passed -or $regression.summary.source_pack_rows_checked -ne 48 -or $regression.summary.adapter_payloads_checked -ne 5 -or $regression.summary.adapter_elements_checked -ne 60) { throw 'Routing regression count mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('fff-malformed-missing-span-guard-001', 'docs/review/malformed-missing-span-guard.md', 'artifacts/malformed-missing-span-guard-result.json', 'malformed source spans guarded', '8', '0 accepted routed candidates') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $html.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } };
